_schema_doc.sources: keyed by relative path under .raw/. Each value: {ingested_at, size_bytes, modified_at, content_hash, source_type, project, pages_created, pages_updated}
_schema_doc.projects: keyed by project name. Each value: {source_path, vault_path, last_ingested, sources_ingested, total_sources}
_schema_doc.stats: vault-wide counters. last_full_rebuild is the most recent /wiki-rebuild operation.
